title: solenostemon monostachyus subsp. lateriticola
intro: Solenostemon monostachyus subsp. lateriticola, also known as the Lateritic Coleus, is a subspecies of the Solenostemon monostachyus plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from digestive issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Lateritic Coleus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
